title: Undertale HealthBars
description: A mod that adds health bars from Undertale into Minecraft!
body:
# DEPENDENCIES
**[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (Required)**  
**[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional but recommended!)**

# MOD INFO
Do you like Undertale? **Yes?**   
Do you like HealthBar Mods? **Yes?**  
Do you wish there was a HealthBar mod that would have Undertale like HealthBars?  
Well this is the Undertale HealthBars mod!  
A mod that adds Undertale styled HealthBars into Minecraft!  
![Undertale Healthbar above iron golem when attacking it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89f62e0a3f30131d51aa7952b48cfaf6b755e5ac.png)


# Features
1- Shows healthbars of entities and their damage/healing amount  
2- Plays damage and heal sounds from Undertale
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mzb01QUWrkw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

3- Replaces normal BossBars with Undertale like bossbars (Ender Dragon and Wither only)
![Undertale HealthBars BossBars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2dba957042759a0ff64348355f90a56ac942d32_0.webp)

4- Lots of Configuration Options (with YACL)
![Undertale HealthBars Config Page 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec2be708c6557f1841599f810b9fa16cd9a3810b.png)
![Undertale HealthBars Config Page 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63130131fa312300517372f624e1b806d1e696f1.png)
![Undertale HealthBars Config Page 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5123648a15b3828823cb613f434c4b74f182e843.png)

# CREDITS
**Toby Fox** and **Temmie Chang** for making Undertale! ([Undertale on Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/391540/Undertale/))  
[**AdyTech99's Health Indicators Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/health-indicators) which i used its code to update this mod's Minecraft version! [**More info**](https://github.com/Kevin11git/Undertale_HealthBars/blob/master/src/client/java/net/kevineleven/undertale_healthbars/mixin/LivingEntityRendererMixin.java#L32)  
**LunaticFirework** for russian translation ([Play his games here!](https://lunaticfirework.itch.io/))  


_If I'm missing any credits please dm me on discord or on my discord server._  
_my username: kevin_eleven2007_
